name: Chicken Breast with Leeks and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 whole chicken breast with skin, halved
2 medium leek, white part only; washed, dried, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, whisk together the flour, paprika, salt, and pepper.
2. Dredge each chicken breast in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat olive oil over moderately high heat in a heavy skillet until hot but not smoking.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and sauté, turning once, until golden brown.
5. Reduce heat to moderately low. Stir in leeks, mushrooms, wine, broth, and oregano.
6. Cook mixture, partially covered, for 25 to 30 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
7. Transfer chicken to a platter.
8. Add olives, capers, and lemon juice to the skillet; stir and cook for 1 minute.
9. Serve chicken topped with leek mixture.
